'''safama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackhead|crackhead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackhead|crackhead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| safama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæfæmæth|sæfæmæth]] || [[word:sæfæmæj|sæfæmæj]] || [[word:sæfæmæsh|sæfæmæsh]] || [[word:sæfæmæ|sæfæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:safafamath|safafamath]] || [[word:safafamaj|safafamaj]] || [[word:safafamash|safafamash]] || [[word:safafama|safafama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:safamath|safamath]] || [[word:safamaj|safamaj]] || [[word:safamash|safamash]] || [[word:safama|safama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:safafmath|safafmath]] || [[word:safafmaj|safafmaj]] || [[word:safafmash|safafmash]] || [[word:safafmaf|safafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:safamatha|safamatha]] || [[word:safamaja|safamaja]] || [[word:safamasha|safamasha]] || [[word:safamaka|safamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:safamath|safamath]] || [[word:safamaj|safamaj]] || [[word:safamash|safamash]] || [[word:safama|safama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:safamathal|safamathal]] || [[word:safamajal|safamajal]] || [[word:safamashal|safamashal]] || [[word:safamakal|safamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:safamathatha|safamathatha]] || [[word:safamajaja|safamajaja]] || [[word:safamashasha|safamashasha]] || [[word:safamaka|safamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:safamathan|safamathan]] || [[word:safamajan|safamajan]] || [[word:safamashan|safamashan]] || [[word:safamakan|safamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:safamathaoro|safamathaoro]] || [[word:safamajaoro|safamajaoro]] || [[word:safamashaoro|safamashaoro]] || [[word:safamakaoro|safamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
